title: Higher education student statistics UK: 2020 to 2021
body: "These statistics on student enrolments and qualifications obtained by higher education (HE) students at HE providers in the UK are produced by the Higher Education Statistics Agency (HESA). Information is available for:   undergraduate and postgraduate study full-time and part-time study country of domicile subject area demographics and disadvantage degree classifications   Earlier higher education student statistics bulletins are available on the HESA website. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education courses and qualifications
